hooks.command: uv run --no-project --python 3.11 python -c "from pathlib import Path; import runpy; script=next((root / 'scripts' / 'harness_runtime.py' for root in (Path.cwd(), *Path.cwd().parents) if (root / 'scripts' / 'harness_runtime.py').is_file()), None); assert script is not None, 'Unable to locate harness runtime'; runpy.run_path(str(script), run_name='__main__')" session-start
hooks.statusMessage: Loading project memory and harness state...
